title: Biswendra Paswan

infobox.value: * [Dalit Janajati Party](/wiki/Dalit_Janajati_Party "Dalit Janajati Party") * [Bahujan Shakti Party](/wiki/Bahujan_Shakti_Party "Bahujan Shakti Party") (now)

This article about a Nepalese politician is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Biswendra_Paswan&action=edit).

([Nepali](/wiki/Nepali_language "Nepali language"): विश्वेन्द्र पासवान) is a [Nepalese](/wiki/Nepal "Nepal") politician and [human rights](/wiki/Human_rights "Human rights") activist. He was the chairman of the [Dalit Janajati Party](/wiki/Dalit_Janajati_Party "Dalit Janajati Party"). He is the president of the [Bahujan Shakti Party](/wiki/Bahujan_Shakti_Party "Bahujan Shakti Party") and an avowed [Ambedkarite](/wiki/Ambedkarite "Ambedkarite").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[2]](#cite_note-forwardpress-2) He was a member of the Nepalese Constituent Assembly. He served as Minister of Science, Technology, Environment and Population, Govt. of Nepal.[[3]](#cite_note-spotlightnepal-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Border-4)[[5]](#cite_note-twitter-5) He belongs to [Dalit](/wiki/Dalit "Dalit") community, and follows [Buddhism](/wiki/Buddhism "Buddhism").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[6]](#cite_note-forwardpress2-6)

["'आम सहमति' के झमेले में फंसा नेपाल का प्रस्तावित संविधान | फॉरवर्ड प्रेस"](https://www.forwardpress.in/2016/01/what-consensus-is-doing-to-nepals-draft-constitution-hindi/). *forwardpress.in*. Retrieved 2022-04-08.

New Spotlight Magazine. [""We Need Focused Adaptation Actions" Vishwendra Paswan | New Spotlight Magazine"](https://www.spotlightnepal.com/2016/06/03/we-need-focused-adaptation-actions-vishwendra-paswan/). *spotlightnepal.com*. Retrieved 2022-04-08.

["Border issues have brought chill in Indo-Nepal ties: Minister"](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/news/politics-and-nation/border-issues-have-brought-chill-in-indo-nepal-ties-minister/articleshow/50630352.cms). *The Economic Times*. Retrieved 2022-04-08.

["United Nations Mission in Nepal (UNMIN) : Activities » Activities Update » Activity Details"](https://web.archive.org/web/20080506134021/http://www.unmin.org.np/?d=activities&p=activity_detail&aid=69). Archived from [the original](http://www.unmin.org.np/?d=activities&p=activity_detail&aid=69) on 2008-05-06. Retrieved 2008-05-06.

first_paragraph: **Vishwendra Paswan** ([Nepali](/wiki/Nepali_language "Nepali language"): विश्वेन्द्र पासवान) is a [Nepalese](/wiki/Nepal "Nepal") politician and [human rights](/wiki/Human_rights "Human rights") activist. He was the chairman of the [Dalit Janajati Party](/wiki/Dalit_Janajati_Party "Dalit Janajati Party"). He is the president of the [Bahujan Shakti Party](/wiki/Bahujan_Shakti_Party "Bahujan Shakti Party") and an avowed [Ambedkarite](/wiki/Ambedkarite "Ambedkarite").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[2]](#cite_note-forwardpress-2) He was a member of the Nepalese Constituent Assembly. He served as Minister of Science, Technology, Environment and Population, Govt. of Nepal.[[3]](#cite_note-spotlightnepal-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Border-4)[[5]](#cite_note-twitter-5) He belongs to [Dalit](/wiki/Dalit "Dalit") community, and follows [Buddhism](/wiki/Buddhism "Buddhism").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[6]](#cite_note-forwardpress2-6)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Nepali politician

**Vishwendra Paswan** ([Nepali](/wiki/Nepali_language "Nepali language"): विश्वेन्द्र पासवान) is a [Nepalese](/wiki/Nepal "Nepal") politician and [human rights](/wiki/Human_rights "Human rights") activist. He was the chairman of the [Dalit Janajati Party](/wiki/Dalit_Janajati_Party "Dalit Janajati Party"). He is the president of the [Bahujan Shakti Party](/wiki/Bahujan_Shakti_Party "Bahujan Shakti Party") and an avowed [Ambedkarite](/wiki/Ambedkarite "Ambedkarite").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[2]](#cite_note-forwardpress-2) He was a member of the Nepalese Constituent Assembly. He served as Minister of Science, Technology, Environment and Population, Govt. of Nepal.[[3]](#cite_note-spotlightnepal-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Border-4)[[5]](#cite_note-twitter-5) He belongs to [Dalit](/wiki/Dalit "Dalit") community, and follows [Buddhism](/wiki/Buddhism "Buddhism").[[1]](#cite_note-scroll-1)[[6]](#cite_note-forwardpress2-6)

Vishwendra Paswan is known as the "[Ambedkar](/wiki/Ambedkar "Ambedkar") of Nepal".[[6]](#cite_note-forwardpress2-6)

[[7]](#cite_note-7)[[8]](#cite_note-8)[[9]](#cite_note-9)[[10]](#cite_note-10)

In the [2008 Constituent Assembly election](/wiki/2008_Nepalese_Constituent_Assembly_election "2008 Nepalese Constituent Assembly election"), the Dalit Janajati Party won 1 seat through the [Proportional Representation](/wiki/Proportional_Representation "Proportional Representation") vote.[[11]](#cite_note-11) The party selected Paswan as its representative in the assembly.
